description: Stocks with significant price gaps to analyze support/resistance levels

market_conditions.interpretation: Neutral sentiment with high valuation - focus on technical levels

stocks.expected_reason: Near support level (115), gap to resistance at 130
Near support, RSI oversold, gap to resistance provides upside target

NVDA.US.notes: Bounced near support at 115, moved toward resistance

BABA.US.notes: Strong bounce from oversold, filled gap toward 130 resistance

gap_theory_principles.resistance_behavior: Price tends to pause or reverse at gap levels
gap_theory_principles.gap_fill_probability: Higher when combined with RSI extremes

strategy_validation.key_insight: Gap analysis combined with RSI provides strong entry/exit signals

lessons_learned: Support at 50MA convergence is stronger than standalone support
Oversold RSI + near support = high probability bounce
Gap fill targets should be realistic (nearest resistance)
Volume confirmation increases gap fill probability
Multiple gaps provide multiple trading opportunities
